Links Distinguished by Color Only Test Page

This page contains links inside <p>, <li>, and <td> elements that are only differentiated from surrounding text by color. There is no underline, no border, and no font-weight difference.

Read the accessibility guidelines to learn more about color contrast requirements. The WCAG documentation provides detailed technical specifications.

  • Visit the getting started guide for beginners
  • Read about keyboard navigation patterns
  • Learn about ARIA landmarks for screen readers
Resource Description
WCAG 2.1 Web Content Accessibility Guidelines
ARIA Spec Accessible Rich Internet Applications
